violations.text: Raw animal foods (such as chicken) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (such as milk and dressings) in the refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food during storage. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/27/2025

Turkey was observed thawing in stagnant water in the 3 bay sink. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods must be thawed in one of the following manners: under refrigeration (41 degrees Fahrenheit or less); completely submerged under running water; as part of the cooking process; or in the microwave if cooked immediately after thawing. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/27/2025

Raw animal foods (such as eggs) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (such as avacados) in the prep unit`. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. New Violation. Correct By: 06/13/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (mandolin) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. New Violation. Correct By: 06/13/2025
Working container used for storing chemicals taken from bulk supplies (small bottle of machine oil?) was not marked with the common name of the chemical. New Violation. Correct By: 06/13/2025

Wood is used in the construction of shelf in the front service area. Non-food contact surfaces of equipment that are exposed to splash, spillage, or other food soiling or that require frequent cleaning must be constructed of a nonabsorbent and smooth material. New Violation. Correct By: 06/13/2025
Original delivery plastic observed on some shelves, in some cases ragged with bits missing. New Violation. Correct By: 06/13/2025

Shelves observed lined with paper. Non-food contact surfaces of equipment that are exposed to splash, spillage, or other food soiling or that require frequent cleaning must be constructed of a nonabsorbent and smooth material. New Violation. Correct By: 06/13/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the prep unit have an accumulation of food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 06/13/2025
The pipe from the 3 bay sink is in poor repair, with water dripping into a container. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 06/13/2025

A seal at the splash guard on the hand sink is in poor repair, pulled away with a portion of it missing. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 06/13/2025
